title: Act II Finish — Pool, Drawing Room, Doritos, Peacock

references.@Image1: character sheet — subject appearance, wardrobe, posh British demeanor
references.@Image2: style plate — American manor, champagne grade, 50mm lens, tungsten light
references.@Image3: Chunk 3 storyboard grid — pool, gallery, drawing room, product, peacock beats

prompt:
@Image1's character as the subject, gold floral wrap dress throughout. She speaks throughout with a posh British accent — flat monotone, matter-of-fact. Scene and color grade reference @Image2. Shot sequence reference @Image3. Warm prestige American manor, cream walls honey hardwood oil portraits brass lamps soft tungsten light, 50mm shallow depth of field warm champagne grade, deadpan blocking sincere camera, 15 seconds. Doritos appear only final four seconds. No steak anywhere.

0–4s: Wide indoor pool conservatory steamy glass walls turquoise water brass ladder cream moulding honey hardwood trim, she stands fully dressed at marble pool edge talks to camera with British deadpan, white swan glides across water behind she does not react, soft water lap posh British dialogue on pool boy and boundaries.

4–7s: Wide gallery hall cream walls honey hardwood oil portraits brass table lamps, she walks toward camera deadpan British delivery on chlorine and hope, smooth backward track centred 50mm.

7–10s: Medium drawing room white marble fireplace gilt mantel brass andirons Persian rug, stern older woman oil portrait in heavy gilt frame on wall behind shoulder, she stands centre facing camera finishes monologue with posh British accent on mother in frame and exits does not glance at portrait, slow push in dialogue ends at 10s.

10–12s: Same drawing room, butler enters from right silver platter with opened Nacho Cheese Doritos bag centred on tray, she reaches lifts one chip without breaking eye contact, silver tray clink no dialogue.

12–13s: Close-up 50mm she bites Dorito loud crisp crunch British deadpan expression unchanged, room tone dips.

13–15s: Wide drawing room locked-off white peacock full tail struts foreground left to right herringbone parquet, she by fireplace mid-ground chewing does not look at peacock, hard cut extreme close-up she says one deadpan British word Bold, super title Doritos For the Bold.

Voice: posh British accent through 10s, silence during crunch, one British deadpan word at 14s. She never names Doritos in dialogue.

Dialogue: The pool boy left a note about pH. I left one about boundaries. He cried. Men do. I don't. Before six I don't do chlorine, or hope, or subtitles. My mother says I'm dramatic. She's in a frame. Not mine. I don't collect guilt. I collect exits.

style.look: warm prestige American manor, cream walls honey hardwood, 50mm shallow DOF, champagne grade, practical tungsten light
style.mood: deadpan throughout, product and peacock completely unacknowledged
style.pacing: monologue completes before product enters frame
style.accent: posh British accent throughout, flat monotone, upper-class cadence

dialogue.voice: posh British accent, British female, flat monotone through 0:10, silence during crunch, one deadpan British word at 0:14
dialogue.text: The pool boy left a note about pH. I left one about boundaries. He cried. Men do. I don't. Before six I don't do chlorine, or hope, or subtitles. My mother says I'm dramatic. She's in a frame. Not mine. I don't collect guilt. I collect exits.

product.name: Doritos Nacho Cheese
product.appearance: opened Nacho Cheese Doritos bag centred on silver platter, triangular chip in her hand at bite
product.rule: butler and bag enter at 0:10 only, actress never names product in dialogue
